overall.description: A cinematic scene from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) depicting a tense confrontation in a dimly lit industrial office. An armored soldier with red-accented gear confronts a civilian worker, eventually drawing a weapon while the camera slowly explores the cluttered workspace with holographic monitors and scattered documents.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered office workspace with multiple computer stations

agents.ego_description: The armored character stands near the security door observing the room while the camera slowly pans across the office space.

notable_agents.action: Standing guard near the metal security door, facing into the room.
Working at a computer desk, typing on a keyboard with headphones on.

entered.detail: Heavy industrial metal door with diagonal reinforcement brace and frosted glass panels.
Desk with keyboard, monitor, and scattered papers.
Large curved screen displaying orange and yellow data visualizations and graphs.
Black ergonomic swivel chair with armrests.
Grey metal cabinet with multiple drawers against the back wall.
Adjustable arm desk lamp with circular base.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit industrial office, revealing a workspace with holographic monitors displaying data, cluttered desks with coffee cups, and a heavy security door. An armored soldier stands guard near the door while a worker types at a distant desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: office workspace center area near filing cabinets

events.description: Camera moves closer to the desk worker, shifting focus from the room overview to the characters.
Armored character raises a rifle and aims it at the desk worker, initiating a confrontation.

agents.ego_description: The armored character moves toward the desk, adjusts their helmet, then draws and aims a rifle at the worker.

notable_agents.action: Moving through the office, adjusting helmet gear, then drawing a large rifle and aiming it.
Working at the desk, then looking up in fear as the weapon is aimed at them.

entered.detail: Open cardboard box on the desk containing vinyl records with colorful album covers.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the center of the room where the armored soldier moves toward the desk worker. The soldier adjusts their gear and suddenly draws a rifle, aiming it at the worker who looks up from their computer in fear. A cardboard box of records becomes visible on the desk.

scene_state.functional_zone: desk area with vinyl record collection

events.description: Desk worker raises hands in surrender and moves away from the desk as the camera passes.

agents.ego_description: The armored character maintains aim then moves back toward the security door while the camera focuses on the desk items.

notable_agents.action: Maintaining aim on the worker, then slowly backing toward the security door.
Raising hands in surrender, then quickly moving away from the desk toward the left.

entered.detail: Collection of vinyl records inside the cardboard box, including titles like 'Samurai' with colorful cover art.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the frightened desk worker who raises their hands in surrender and moves away. The focus shifts to a close-up of a cardboard box containing vintage vinyl records on the desk, while the armored soldier remains visible in the background near the security door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial office that shifts from a quiet workspace into a scene of sudden high-tension confrontation. It begins by entering the room, gliding past holographic monitors and cluttered desks toward an armored soldier standing guard by a heavy security door. As the camera approaches the center of the room, the soldier moves aggressively toward a desk worker and suddenly draws a rifle, aiming it at the startled employee. The scene then shifts past the frightened worker, who raises their hands in surrender, before the focus narrows onto a cardboard box of vintage vinyl records resting on the desk. Finally, the camera lingers on these records while the armored soldier remains a menacing presence in the background near the exit.
